desc: How to share your view, agree, or disagree politely.

sentences.cn: 我觉得这件事很有道理。
sentences.py: Wǒ juéde zhè jiàn shì hěn yǒu dàolǐ.
sentences.en: I think this matter makes a lot of sense.
sentences.use: stating personal opinion · variants: 这种做法很有道理 / 这个观点很有道理

sentences.cn: 在我看来，最重要的是健康。
sentences.py: Zài wǒ kàn lái, zuì zhòngyào de shì jiànkāng.
sentences.en: In my view, the most important thing is health.

sentences.cn: 我认为我们应该先解决这个问题。
sentences.py: Wǒ rènwéi wǒmen yīnggāi xiān jiějué zhège wèntí.
sentences.en: I believe we should solve this problem first.

sentences.cn: 对我来说，学中文虽然难，但是很有意思。
sentences.py: Duì wǒ lái shuō, xué Zhōngwén suīrán nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi.
sentences.en: For me, learning Chinese is hard but very interesting.

sentences.cn: 我同意你的看法，不过有一点我有不同的意见。
sentences.py: Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, búguò yǒu yì diǎn wǒ yǒu bù tóng de yìjiàn.
sentences.en: I agree with your view, but I have a different opinion on one point.

sentences.cn: 其实，每个人都有自己的优点和缺点。
sentences.py: Qíshí, měi gè rén dōu yǒu zìjǐ de yōudiǎn hé quēdiǎn.
sentences.en: Actually, everyone has their own strengths and weaknesses.

sentences.cn: 我相信只要努力就一定会成功。
sentences.py: Wǒ xiāngxìn zhǐyào nǔlì jiù yídìng huì chénggōng.
sentences.en: I believe as long as you work hard, you will succeed.

sentences.cn: 从我的经验来看，最好提前做好准备。
sentences.py: Cóng wǒ de jīngyàn lái kàn, zuìhǎo tíqián zuò hǎo zhǔnbèi.
sentences.en: From my experience, it is best to prepare in advance.

sentences.cn: 我的看法是，做事情要有耐心。
sentences.py: Wǒ de kànfǎ shì, zuò shìqíng yào yǒu nàixīn.
sentences.en: My view is, you need patience to do things.

sentences.cn: 说实话，我还没考虑好这个问题。
sentences.py: Shuō shíhuà, wǒ hái méi kǎolǜ hǎo zhège wèntí.
sentences.en: Honestly, I haven't fully thought through this question yet.

desc: Polite recommendations and warnings tested in HSK 4 writing.

sentences.cn: 我建议你先听听老师的意见，再做决定。
sentences.py: Wǒ jiànyì nǐ xiān tīng tīng lǎoshī de yìjiàn, zài zuò juédìng.
sentences.en: I suggest you listen to the teacher first before deciding.

sentences.cn: 你最好提前告诉他，免得他着急。
sentences.py: Nǐ zuì hǎo tíqián gàosu tā, miǎnde tā zháojí.
sentences.en: You'd better tell him in advance, so he doesn't worry.

sentences.cn: 为了身体健康，我们应该多锻炼。
sentences.py: Wèile shēntǐ jiànkāng, wǒmen yīnggāi duō duànliàn.
sentences.en: For our health, we should exercise more.

sentences.cn: 你不如先休息一下，再继续工作吧。
sentences.py: Nǐ bùrú xiān xiūxi yíxià, zài jìxù gōngzuò ba.
sentences.en: You'd better rest first before continuing to work.

sentences.cn: 千万不要熬夜，对身体不好。
sentences.py: Qiānwàn bú yào áoyè, duì shēntǐ bù hǎo.
sentences.en: Whatever you do, don't stay up late — it's bad for your health.

sentences.cn: 如果有问题，可以随时联系我。
sentences.py: Rúguǒ yǒu wèntí, kěyǐ suíshí liánxì wǒ.
sentences.en: If you have questions, you can contact me anytime.

sentences.cn: 我觉得你应该试试这种方法，效果可能会更好。
sentences.py: Wǒ juéde nǐ yīnggāi shì shi zhè zhǒng fāngfǎ, xiàoguǒ kěnéng huì gèng hǎo.
sentences.en: I think you should try this method — the result might be better.

sentences.cn: 建议大家平时多积累一些经验。
sentences.py: Jiànyì dàjiā píngshí duō jīlěi yìxiē jīngyàn.
sentences.en: I suggest everyone accumulate more experience in daily life.

sentences.cn: 你可以问问别人，也许他们有更好的办法。
sentences.py: Nǐ kěyǐ wèn wèn biérén, yěxǔ tāmen yǒu gèng hǎo de bànfǎ.
sentences.en: You can ask others — they may have better ideas.

sentences.cn: 最重要的是不要放弃，坚持下去就会有结果。
sentences.py: Zuì zhòngyào de shì bú yào fàngqì, jiānchí xiàqù jiù huì yǒu jiéguǒ.
sentences.en: The most important thing is not to give up — keep going and you will see results.

desc: 因为/由于/所以/因此 patterns for explanations.

sentences.cn: 因为下大雨，所以我们决定不去公园了。
sentences.py: Yīnwèi xià dà yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒmen juédìng bú qù gōngyuán le.
sentences.en: Because it was raining heavily, we decided not to go to the park.

sentences.cn: 由于天气原因，今天的活动取消了。
sentences.py: Yóuyú tiānqì yuányīn, jīntiān de huódòng qǔxiāo le.
sentences.en: Due to the weather, today's activity has been cancelled.

sentences.cn: 之所以失败，是因为我们准备得不够充分。
sentences.py: Zhī suǒyǐ shībài, shì yīnwèi wǒmen zhǔnbèi de bú gòu chōngfèn.
sentences.en: The reason we failed is that we didn't prepare adequately.

sentences.cn: 既然你已经决定了，我就不再说什么了。
sentences.py: Jìrán nǐ yǐjīng juédìng le, wǒ jiù bú zài shuō shénme le.
sentences.en: Since you've already decided, I won't say more.

sentences.cn: 这件事的结果让所有人都很满意。
sentences.py: Zhè jiàn shì de jiéguǒ ràng suǒyǒu rén dōu hěn mǎnyì.
sentences.en: The outcome of this matter has made everyone very satisfied.

sentences.cn: 为了准备考试，他每天学习到很晚。
sentences.py: Wèile zhǔnbèi kǎoshì, tā měi tiān xuéxí dào hěn wǎn.
sentences.en: In order to prepare for the exam, he studies until very late every day.

sentences.cn: 因此，我们应该更加重视这个问题。
sentences.py: Yīncǐ, wǒmen yīnggāi gèng jiā zhòngshì zhège wèntí.
sentences.en: Therefore, we should pay more attention to this issue.

sentences.cn: 他说话很有道理，所以大家都听他的。
sentences.py: Tā shuō huà hěn yǒu dàolǐ, suǒyǐ dàjiā dōu tīng tā de.
sentences.en: What he says makes sense, so everyone listens to him.

sentences.cn: 由于他的努力，公司的效率提高了很多。
sentences.py: Yóuyú tā de nǔlì, gōngsī de xiàolǜ tígāo le hěn duō.
sentences.en: Thanks to his efforts, the company's efficiency has improved a lot.

sentences.cn: 我们之所以选择这家公司，是因为它的服务好。
sentences.py: Wǒmen zhī suǒyǐ xuǎnzé zhè jiā gōngsī, shì yīnwèi tā de fúwù hǎo.
sentences.en: The reason we chose this company is its good service.

desc: 虽然/尽管/即使/不过 — show two sides.

sentences.cn: 虽然他很累，但是还在坚持工作。
sentences.py: Suīrán tā hěn lèi, dànshì hái zài jiānchí gōngzuò.
sentences.en: Although he is tired, he is still working hard.

sentences.cn: 尽管下着大雨，他还是按时来上班了。
sentences.py: Jǐnguǎn xià zhe dà yǔ, tā háishi ànshí lái shàngbān le.
sentences.en: Despite the heavy rain, he still came to work on time.

sentences.cn: 即使遇到困难，我也不会放弃。
sentences.py: Jíshǐ yùdào kùnnán, wǒ yě bú huì fàngqì.
sentences.en: Even if I encounter difficulties, I will not give up.

sentences.cn: 他的中文虽然不太流利，但是发音很标准。
sentences.py: Tā de Zhōngwén suīrán bú tài liúlì, dànshì fāyīn hěn biāozhǔn.
sentences.en: Although his Chinese is not very fluent, his pronunciation is very standard.

sentences.cn: 其实事情没有想象的那么严重。
sentences.py: Qíshí shìqíng méiyǒu xiǎngxiàng de nàme yánzhòng.
sentences.en: Actually, the matter is not as serious as imagined.

sentences.cn: 不过，这个办法也有一些缺点。
sentences.py: Búguò, zhège bànfǎ yě yǒu yìxiē quēdiǎn.
sentences.en: However, this method also has some shortcomings.

sentences.cn: 无论遇到什么困难，我们都要坚持到底。
sentences.py: Wúlùn yùdào shénme kùnnán, wǒmen dōu yào jiānchí dàodǐ.
sentences.en: No matter what difficulties we encounter, we must persist to the end.

sentences.cn: 不管多忙，他每天都会陪孩子玩一会儿。
sentences.py: Bùguǎn duō máng, tā měi tiān dōu huì péi háizi wán yíhuìr.
sentences.en: No matter how busy he is, he plays with his child every day.

sentences.cn: 可是我没想到结果会这样。
sentences.py: Kěshì wǒ méi xiǎngdào jiéguǒ huì zhèyàng.
sentences.en: But I didn't expect the outcome would be like this.

sentences.cn: 然而，事实并不像他说的那么简单。
sentences.py: Rán'ér, shìshí bìng bú xiàng tā shuō de nàme jiǎndān.
sentences.en: However, the fact is not as simple as he said.

desc: 随着/越来越/比以前 patterns for time-based change.

sentences.cn: 随着时间的变化，他变得越来越成熟了。
sentences.py: Suízhe shíjiān de biànhuà, tā biàn de yuè lái yuè chéngshú le.
sentences.en: Over time, he has become more and more mature.

sentences.cn: 近几年，中国的发展非常快。
sentences.py: Jìn jǐ nián, Zhōngguó de fāzhǎn fēicháng kuài.
sentences.en: In recent years, China's development has been very fast.

sentences.cn: 现在的年轻人和以前不太一样了。
sentences.py: Xiànzài de niánqīngrén hé yǐqián bú tài yíyàng le.
sentences.en: Today's young people are different from before.

sentences.cn: 天气越来越冷，注意多穿点衣服。
sentences.py: Tiānqì yuè lái yuè lěng, zhùyì duō chuān diǎn yīfu.
sentences.en: The weather is getting colder — make sure to dress warmly.

sentences.cn: 他的汉语水平比以前提高了很多。
sentences.py: Tā de Hànyǔ shuǐpíng bǐ yǐqián tígāo le hěn duō.
sentences.en: His Chinese level has improved a lot compared to before.

sentences.cn: 这座城市的样子比十年前完全不同了。
sentences.py: Zhè zuò chéngshì de yàngzi bǐ shí nián qián wánquán bùtóng le.
sentences.en: This city looks completely different from ten years ago.

sentences.cn: 随着科技的发展，人们的生活越来越方便。
sentences.py: Suízhe kējì de fāzhǎn, rénmen de shēnghuó yuè lái yuè fāngbiàn.
sentences.en: With the development of technology, life becomes more convenient.

sentences.cn: 她的脾气最近变好了很多。
sentences.py: Tā de píqì zuìjìn biàn hǎo le hěn duō.
sentences.en: Her temper has gotten much better recently.

sentences.cn: 公司的政策最近做了一些调整。
sentences.py: Gōngsī de zhèngcè zuìjìn zuò le yìxiē tiáozhěng.
sentences.en: The company's policy has been adjusted recently.

sentences.cn: 经过这次失败，他变得更加坚强了。
sentences.py: Jīngguò zhè cì shībài, tā biàn de gèng jiā jiānqiáng le.
sentences.en: After this failure, he has become even stronger.

desc: 比/不如/跟…一样 patterns. Heavy on HSK 4 reading.

sentences.cn: 和他相比，我还有很多需要学习的地方。
sentences.py: Hé tā xiāng bǐ, wǒ hái yǒu hěn duō xūyào xuéxí de dìfang.
sentences.en: Compared to him, I still have a lot to learn.

sentences.cn: 这个方法比那个方法效果好得多。
sentences.py: Zhège fāngfǎ bǐ nàge fāngfǎ xiàoguǒ hǎo de duō.
sentences.en: This method is much more effective than that one.

sentences.cn: 今年的天气没有去年那么冷。
sentences.py: Jīnnián de tiānqì méiyǒu qùnián nàme lěng.
sentences.en: This year's weather is not as cold as last year.

sentences.cn: 他的中文跟中国人一样流利。
sentences.py: Tā de Zhōngwén gēn Zhōngguórén yíyàng liúlì.
sentences.en: His Chinese is as fluent as a native speaker's.

sentences.cn: 我的工资不如他高，但是工作比较轻松。
sentences.py: Wǒ de gōngzī bùrú tā gāo, dànshì gōngzuò bǐjiào qīngsōng.
sentences.en: My salary is not as high as his, but the work is relatively easy.

sentences.cn: 比起去年，今年的销售额增加了百分之三十。
sentences.py: Bǐ qǐ qùnián, jīnnián de xiāoshòu'é zēngjiā le bǎi fēn zhī sānshí.
sentences.en: Compared to last year, sales have increased by 30% this year.

sentences.cn: 和城市相比，农村的生活更安静。
sentences.py: Hé chéngshì xiāng bǐ, nóngcūn de shēnghuó gèng ānjìng.
sentences.en: Compared with the city, life in the countryside is quieter.

sentences.cn: 这次考试比上次难一些。
sentences.py: Zhè cì kǎoshì bǐ shàng cì nán yìxiē.
sentences.en: This exam is a bit harder than the last one.

sentences.cn: 他比我大三岁。
sentences.py: Tā bǐ wǒ dà sān suì.
sentences.en: He is three years older than me.

sentences.cn: 我觉得这本书没有那本书有意思。
sentences.py: Wǒ juéde zhè běn shū méiyǒu nà běn shū yǒu yìsi.
sentences.en: I think this book is not as interesting as that one.

desc: Profession, character, appearance — for the writing section.

sentences.cn: 他是一个非常有责任感的人。
sentences.py: Tā shì yí gè fēicháng yǒu zérèngǎn de rén.
sentences.en: He is a very responsible person.

sentences.cn: 她长得很漂亮，性格也很开朗。
sentences.py: Tā zhǎng de hěn piàoliang, xìnggé yě hěn kāilǎng.
sentences.en: She is pretty and has a cheerful personality.

sentences.cn: 他对工作很认真，从来不马虎。
sentences.py: Tā duì gōngzuò hěn rènzhēn, cónglái bù mǎhu.
sentences.en: He is very serious about his work and never careless.

sentences.cn: 我父亲是一名医生，已经工作了三十年了。
sentences.py: Wǒ fùqīn shì yì míng yīshēng, yǐjīng gōngzuò le sānshí nián le.
sentences.en: My father is a doctor and has been working for thirty years.

sentences.cn: 她不仅聪明，而且很善良。
sentences.py: Tā bùjǐn cōngmíng, érqiě hěn shànliáng.
sentences.en: She is not only smart but also kind.

sentences.cn: 他这个人很幽默，跟他在一起总是很开心。
sentences.py: Tā zhège rén hěn yōumò, gēn tā zài yìqǐ zǒngshì hěn kāixīn.
sentences.en: He has a great sense of humor — being with him is always fun.

sentences.cn: 他对人很热情，谁有困难他都愿意帮忙。
sentences.py: Tā duì rén hěn rèqíng, shéi yǒu kùnnán tā dōu yuànyì bāngmáng.
sentences.en: He is warm to people and willing to help anyone in trouble.

sentences.cn: 李教授是一位很有名的语言学家。
sentences.py: Lǐ jiàoshòu shì yí wèi hěn yǒumíng de yǔyán xué jiā.
sentences.en: Professor Li is a very famous linguist.

sentences.cn: 我哥哥比我高，性格也比我活泼。
sentences.py: Wǒ gēge bǐ wǒ gāo, xìnggé yě bǐ wǒ huópō.
sentences.en: My older brother is taller and more lively than me.

sentences.cn: 他给我留下了非常深的印象。
sentences.py: Tā gěi wǒ liú xià le fēicháng shēn de yìnxiàng.
sentences.en: He left a very deep impression on me.

desc: Duration, sequence, frequency — common in listening.

sentences.cn: 我刚到家就接到了她的电话。
sentences.py: Wǒ gāng dào jiā jiù jiē dào le tā de diànhuà.
sentences.en: I had just gotten home when I got her call.

sentences.cn: 再过一个星期就是中秋节了。
sentences.py: Zài guò yí gè xīngqī jiùshì Zhōngqiū Jié le.
sentences.en: In another week it will be Mid-Autumn Festival.

sentences.cn: 等我做完作业，我们就出去玩。
sentences.py: Děng wǒ zuò wán zuòyè, wǒmen jiù chū qù wán.
sentences.en: Once I finish my homework, we will go out to play.

sentences.cn: 我已经在这里工作了五年了。
sentences.py: Wǒ yǐjīng zài zhèlǐ gōngzuò le wǔ nián le.
sentences.en: I have already been working here for five years.

sentences.cn: 他从来没有迟到过。
sentences.py: Tā cónglái méiyǒu chídào guò.
sentences.en: He has never been late.

sentences.cn: 明天早上8点准时出发，请大家不要迟到。
sentences.py: Míngtiān zǎoshang bā diǎn zhǔnshí chūfā, qǐng dàjiā bú yào chídào.
sentences.en: We will depart at 8 AM tomorrow morning sharp — please don't be late.

sentences.cn: 他在中国住了三年多了。
sentences.py: Tā zài Zhōngguó zhù le sān nián duō le.
sentences.en: He has lived in China for over three years.

sentences.cn: 我每天早上六点起床，七点出门。
sentences.py: Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, qī diǎn chūmén.
sentences.en: I get up at 6 AM and leave home at 7 every day.

sentences.cn: 经过半年的努力，他终于通过了考试。
sentences.py: Jīngguò bàn nián de nǔlì, tā zhōngyú tōngguò le kǎoshì.
sentences.en: After half a year of hard work, he finally passed the exam.

sentences.cn: 时间过得真快，转眼就到春天了。
sentences.py: Shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài, zhuǎnyǎn jiù dào chūntiān le.
sentences.en: Time flies — in the blink of an eye it's spring.

desc: 感到/觉得/让 — emotions tested in attitude questions.

sentences.cn: 听到这个消息，我感到非常高兴。
sentences.py: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, wǒ gǎndào fēicháng gāoxìng.
sentences.en: I felt very happy to hear this news.

sentences.cn: 看到他难过的样子，我也很心疼。
sentences.py: Kàn dào tā nánguò de yàngzi, wǒ yě hěn xīnténg.
sentences.en: Seeing him sad, I also feel sorry for him.

sentences.cn: 这件事让我很感动。
sentences.py: Zhè jiàn shì ràng wǒ hěn gǎndòng.
sentences.en: This matter really touched me.

sentences.cn: 考试前他非常紧张，几乎睡不着觉。
sentences.py: Kǎoshì qián tā fēicháng jǐnzhāng, jīhū shuì bù zháo jiào.
sentences.en: Before the exam he was very nervous, almost couldn't sleep.

sentences.cn: 对于这次的成绩，我感到很满意。
sentences.py: Duìyú zhè cì de chéngjì, wǒ gǎndào hěn mǎnyì.
sentences.en: I feel very satisfied with the result this time.

sentences.cn: 我真的很羡慕你能去那么多地方旅游。
sentences.py: Wǒ zhēn de hěn xiànmù nǐ néng qù nàme duō dìfang lǚyóu.
sentences.en: I really envy that you can travel to so many places.

sentences.cn: 失败了不要难过，下次努力就好了。
sentences.py: Shībài le bú yào nánguò, xià cì nǔlì jiù hǎo le.
sentences.en: Don't be sad about failure — just try harder next time.

sentences.cn: 他的成功让大家都感到骄傲。
sentences.py: Tā de chénggōng ràng dàjiā dōu gǎndào jiāo'ào.
sentences.en: His success makes everyone feel proud.

sentences.cn: 听到他要离开公司，大家都很意外。
sentences.py: Tīng dào tā yào líkāi gōngsī, dàjiā dōu hěn yìwài.
sentences.en: Everyone was very surprised to hear he was leaving the company.

sentences.cn: 我对自己当时的决定感到后悔。
sentences.py: Wǒ duì zìjǐ dāngshí de juédìng gǎndào hòuhuǐ.
sentences.en: I regret the decision I made at that time.

desc: 总之/总的来说/通过 — close any speech or essay.

sentences.cn: 总之，做事要有计划，不能太着急。
sentences.py: Zǒngzhī, zuò shì yào yǒu jìhuà, bù néng tài zháojí.
sentences.en: In short, you need a plan when doing things — you can't rush.

sentences.cn: 总的来说，这次旅行还是很愉快的。
sentences.py: Zǒng de lái shuō, zhè cì lǚxíng háishi hěn yúkuài de.
sentences.en: Overall, this trip was very pleasant.

sentences.cn: 通过这次经历，我学到了很多东西。
sentences.py: Tōngguò zhè cì jīnglì, wǒ xué dào le hěn duō dōngxi.
sentences.en: Through this experience, I learned a lot.

sentences.cn: 由此可见，努力是成功的关键。
sentences.py: Yóu cǐ kě jiàn, nǔlì shì chénggōng de guānjiàn.
sentences.en: From this we can see that effort is the key to success.

sentences.cn: 总而言之，我们应该重视环境保护。
sentences.py: Zǒng ér yán zhī, wǒmen yīnggāi zhòngshì huánjìng bǎohù.
sentences.en: All in all, we should attach importance to environmental protection.

sentences.cn: 这就是我对这个问题的看法。
sentences.py: Zhè jiùshì wǒ duì zhège wèntí de kànfǎ.
sentences.en: This is my view on this question.

sentences.cn: 希望大家能够从中学到一些经验。
sentences.py: Xīwàng dàjiā nénggòu cóng zhōng xué dào yìxiē jīngyàn.
sentences.en: I hope everyone can learn some experience from this.

sentences.cn: 最后，我想感谢所有帮助过我的人。
sentences.py: Zuìhòu, wǒ xiǎng gǎnxiè suǒyǒu bāngzhù guò wǒ de rén.
sentences.en: Finally, I want to thank everyone who has helped me.

sentences.cn: 这个故事告诉我们，做事要坚持到底。
sentences.py: Zhège gùshi gàosu wǒmen, zuò shì yào jiānchí dàodǐ.
sentences.en: This story tells us that we should persist to the end in doing things.

sentences.cn: 总之，这件事给了我们很大的启发。
sentences.py: Zǒngzhī, zhè jiàn shì gěi le wǒmen hěn dà de qǐfā.
sentences.en: In short, this matter gave us a great inspiration.
